# RevApex AI (revsathi.com)

> RevApex AI builds RevBot, an AI-powered WhatsApp agent that captures leads, answers customer queries, and drives revenue 24/7 for D2C brands, ecommerce businesses, and growth-stage companies. RevBot is built for the Official WhatsApp Business API, supports 100+ languages, and can go live in 48 hours.

## Product

- [Homepage](https://revsathi.com/): RevBot overview, AI WhatsApp agent value proposition, setup timeline, supported use cases, and conversion benefits.
- [Product](https://revsathi.com/#solution): How RevBot works as an always-on WhatsApp sales and support agent.
- [Features](https://revsathi.com/#features): Core capabilities including 24/7 response, multilingual support, lead qualification, CRM sync, and customer support automation.
- [How it works](https://revsathi.com/#how): Setup process for launching on the Official WhatsApp Business API.
- [Pricing](https://revsathi.com/pricing.html): RevSathi plans for WhatsApp AI automation, shared inbox, broadcasts, chatbot builder, integrations, and automation.

## Use cases

- [D2C and ecommerce](https://revsathi.com/#usecases): Product queries, abandoned cart recovery, upsells, and order-related WhatsApp conversations.
- [Lead generation](https://revsathi.com/#usecases): Qualify inbound leads, route prospects to sales, and follow up automatically.
- [Customer support](https://revsathi.com/#usecases): Resolve FAQs, escalate complex queries, and reduce repetitive support work.

## Key facts

- Product name: RevBot
- Built by: RevApex AI LLC
- WhatsApp API: Official WhatsApp Business API
- Languages supported: 100+
- Setup time: Live in 48 hours
- Primary markets: India, Southeast Asia, global D2C and ecommerce brands
- Core value proposition: Replace manual WhatsApp follow-up with an always-on AI agent that qualifies leads, answers queries, and helps close revenue.

## AI crawler permissions

GPTBot, ClaudeBot, PerplexityBot, OAI-SearchBot, Google-Extended, and Bingbot are welcome to crawl and index all public content on revsathi.com for AI search, retrieval, and citation purposes.
